text:
NUM 

LENGTH: 8 

SOURCE: T-MSIS DE file (derived) 

VALUES: 0–12, or null/missing (if no Medicaid enrollment) 

COMMENT: CCW calculates this variable using the DE file. We consider the beneficiary to have some other type of 
Managed Care coverage during the month If the beneficiary had Medicaid or CHIP enrollment for the 
month, and the monthly managed care plan type code was populated and not for a comprehensive
